cnbc.title: Americans are feeling inflation's pinch into the holiday weekend. Here's where prices are rising the most
cnbc.summary: Prices related to travel, recreation and food saw particularly steep increases, stretching Americans' wallets as they celebrate the unofficial start of summer.

cnbc.title: Trump says Iran deal reopening Strait of Hormuz 'largely negotiated,' will be announced soon
cnbc.summary: A fragile ceasefire has been in place since April 8, punctuated by skirmishes as the U.S. and Iran jockey over the Strait of Hormuz.

cnbc.title: Spirit's collapse, high fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending
cnbc.summary: The unofficial start of the summer travel season on Memorial Day weekend will show just how much travelers want to fly and how much they're willing to pay.

cnbc.title: Stephen Colbert returns to TV in appearance on local Michigan station

cnbc.title: ‘Blue dot fever’? What's really behind a tricky summer dynamic for live music
cnbc.summary: As prices rise everywhere, consumers are choosing to be more intentional with how they're spending on live music and concerts this year.

cnbc.title: Disney's 'Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu' tallies lowest Thursday preview sales in franchise history
cnbc.summary: Disney's "Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu" tallied $12 million in Thursday night previews, the lowest collection of advance tickets in franchise history.

cnbc.title: Millennials spend $252 on an average date, BMO finds — and social media is spiraling over 'date-flation'
cnbc.summary: Dating costs are rising faster than inflation, pushing many Americans to go on fewer dates, choose cheaper plans or skip dating altogether.
